title: Florivory shapes both leaf and floral interactions
coding_note: Crossref abstract reports a floral-damage manipulation and pretreatment floral anthocyanin/tannin associations with floral antagonisms; overlap with other Impatiens panels is unresolved.

title: Pollinator response to flower color polymorphism and floral display in a plant with a single-locus floral color polymorphism: consequences for plant reproduction
coding_note: Direct colour/display, visitor, and female-fitness observations; discovery B label is not accepted as a floral-barrier role.

title: Influence of Green Leaf Herbivory by Manduca sexta on Floral Volatile Emission by Nicotiana suaveolens
coding_note: Treatment is green-leaf herbivory; floral volatile emission is unchanged. No direct floral A/B predictor for a four-path route.

title: The roles of florivory and herbivory in maintaining intra-population flower colour variation in Anemone coronaria
coding_note: Colour morph-specific petal damage and an experimental florivory/visitor component are described; direct colour-to-damage record is available at abstract resolution.

title: Aggregate enantiostyly: Floral visitor interactions with a previously unreported form of floral display
coding_note: Primary reproductive-ecology study, but the abstract does not establish enantiostyly as A or B under the current role codebook.

title: What are the plant reproductive consequences of losing a nectar robber?
coding_note: Primary nectar-robbery/pollination/fitness experiment; no direct floral trait predictor in the abstract.

title: Florivory and Pollination Intersection: Changes in Floral Trait Expression Do Not Discourage Hummingbird Pollination
coding_note: Floral damage changes corolla outline but not hummingbird pollination: an H-to-A/P study, not a direct A/B-to-P/H route at abstract resolution.

title: Experimental Florivory Influences Reproductive Success in the Field Bindweed (Convolvulus arvensis)
coding_note: Experimental florivory/damage affects reproductive success; no pre-existing floral A/B predictor is stated.

title: Florivory by the occupants of phytotelmata in flower parts can decrease host plant fecundity
coding_note: Experimental florivore-infestation effect on fecundity; no direct floral trait predictor.

title: Floral display and pollination success in Achillea ptarmica (Asteraceae)
coding_note: Natural display-size/visitation analysis plus ray-removal comparison provides direct display-to-visitor evidence.

title: Nectar or perfume as reward? Investigating the pollination and chemical ecology of the bromeliad Cryptanthus bahianus
coding_note: Describes cues, rewards, and visitors but no direct trait-response comparison in the abstract.

title: Resilience of floral scent emission after florivory
coding_note: Natural/experimental florivory effect on scent emission: H-to-A, not a direct A/B-to-P/H route.

title: Floral, reproductive, and pollination biology of Floral, reproductive, and pollination biology of Eugenia myrcianthes Nied.
coding_note: Abstract describes flower biology and visitors, not a tested direct trait-to-outcome relation.

title: Floral scent and pollination of the invasive plant Coreopsis lanceolata in Japan
coding_note: Abstract reports visitors, scent composition, and seed set but no direct trait-response test.

title: Pollinators exert natural selection on flower size and floral display in Penstemon digitalis
coding_note: Crossref deposited text is only 'Featured paper: See Commentary'; full article/source needed before screening.

title: Sexual differences in flower defense and correlated male-biased florivory in a plant-florivore system
coding_note: Flower-bud phenolics/tannins differ by sex and are linked to moth oviposition and larval survival.

title: Range-wide floral trait variation reflects shifts in pollinator assemblages, consistent with pollinator-mediated divergence despite generalized visitation
coding_note: Range-wide floral-trait and visitor-assemblage study; direct associations are stated but trait-specific signs are heterogeneous.

title: Genotype and environment effects on sunflower nectar and their relationships to crop pollination
coding_note: Nectar and prior pollinator-exclusion treatment jointly affect subsequent bee visits; treatment/trait separation requires full text.

title: Flower visitation by hoverflies (Diptera: Syrphidae) in a temperate plant-pollinator network
coding_note: Trait-based analyses relate flower height, inflorescence size, and colour to visitation; discovery B label is not accepted as barrier role.

title: POLLINATION QUALITY, SEED SET, AND FLOWER TRAITS IN POLEMONIUM VISCOSUM: COMPLEMENTARY EFFECTS OF VARIATION IN FLOWER SCENT AND SIZE
coding_note: Flower scent/size are related to outcross pollen quality in context-dependent pollinator assemblages.

title: Pollination of Chamaepantas nobilis (Rubiaceae) by long-proboscid hawkmoths in south-central Africa: Trait mismatching and floral scent chemistry
coding_note: Observational pollination ecology; abstract describes advertising traits but not a trait-variation response comparison.

title: Flower Production, Headspace Volatiles, Pollen Nutrients, and Florivory in Tanacetum vulgare Chemotypes
coding_note: Chemotype and floral-metabolite differences relate to florivorous beetle abundance; barrier role of floral scent remains unresolved at abstract resolution.

title: Integrating floral scent
column15: Framework/review abstract, not a primary empirical study.

title: Regulation of Seed-Set in Polemonium viscosum: Floral Scents, Pollination, and Resources
